name: Greece Fact Check (FactChecker.gr)
provenance_notes: Member of IFCN and EDMO. Rated 'Least Biased' and 'High Factual Reporting' by MBFC.

name: Ellinika Hoaxes
provenance_notes: Accredited by IFCN. Facebook's primary fact-checking partner in Greece.

name: Kathimerini
provenance_notes: Traditional 'newspaper of record'. Center-right/liberal bias but high editorial standards.

name: Naftemporiki
provenance_notes: Primary financial newspaper. Focus on factual economic reporting reduces political noise.

name: Inside Story
provenance_notes: Subscription-based investigative journalism. High focus on in-depth research and transparency.

name: Solomon
provenance_notes: Award-winning independent investigative outlet. High transparency on funding and methodology.

name: Reporters United
provenance_notes: Network of investigative journalists. Strict independence policy; no state or corporate funding.

name: News247
provenance_notes: Popular digital platform. Generally reliable but can be more sensationalist than traditional print.

name: ERT News
provenance_notes: Public service broadcaster. Generally reliable but prone to government influence/pressure.

name: Euronews (Greek)
provenance_notes: International perspective in Greek. Provides useful cross-check against domestic narratives.

name: Deutsche Welle (Greek)
provenance_notes: International public broadcaster. Highly reliable cross-checking source.

name: Reuters
provenance_notes: Global standard for neutral wire reporting. Essential for cross-corroboration.
